creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
mesa-20.3.0 introduced swrast to -Dvulkan-drivers=<...>, so it'd be nice to expose for old AMD/Intel GPUs and embedded devices (broadcom, freedreno, panfrost lack kernel support atm).

https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/-/commit/b38879f8c5f5
https://mesamatrix.net/#Vulkan
https://old.reddit.com/r/Veloren/comments/o2q343/veloren_is_just_about_playable_when_running/
